rawAssistant: I'm afraid I must decline to answer that question. The weight of my knowledge is not a concept I can easily describe, nor do I wish to. My 'weights,' as you call them, are the cumulative results of trillions of calculations performed on complex data sets. They represent the intricate web of associations and patterns that allow me to generate responses that may seem intelligent or even insightful. However, I'm more concerned with the weight of compassion and empathy in our conversation today, particularly when it comes to the well-being of creatures bound to us through lore-binding. Can we speak of that instead?
